# Ghost YT Downloader SaaS API

Ghost YT Downloader is a local SaaS-style API for extracting YouTube transcripts.

Primary use cases:
- create one transcript job
- create a batch of transcript jobs
- poll job or batch status
- authenticate with X-API-Key

Authentication:
- header: X-API-Key
- default local key: ghost-dev-key
- key management CLI: python3 manage_api_keys.py

Core endpoints:
- GET /health
- POST /v1/transcripts
- GET /v1/transcripts/{transcript_id}
- POST /v1/batches
- GET /v1/batches/{batch_id}
- GET /v1/batches/{batch_id}/items
- GET /api/transcript (legacy synchronous endpoint, not recommended for SaaS clients)

Single transcript flow:
1. POST /v1/transcripts with JSON body:
   {"video":"dQw4w9WgXcQ","languages":["es","en"]}
2. Receive 202 Accepted with transcript job metadata.
3. Poll GET /v1/transcripts/{id} until status is completed or failed.

Batch flow:
1. POST /v1/batches with JSON body:
   {"videos":["dQw4w9WgXcQ","https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5X26m52lMwU"],"languages":["es","en"]}
2. Receive 202 Accepted with batch metadata.
3. Poll GET /v1/batches/{id} for aggregate status.
4. Poll GET /v1/batches/{id}/items for per-item results.

Transcript job statuses:
- queued
- processing
- completed
- failed

Batch statuses:
- processing
- completed
- failed
- completed_with_errors

Important behavior:
- transcript text is normalized to a single running text string
- cache is keyed by video_id + language list
- repeated single requests may return completed immediately with cached=true
- invalid video input becomes a failed job or a 400 on the legacy endpoint
- max batch size is controlled by GHOST_MAX_BATCH_SIZE, default 200

Environment variables:
- GHOST_DB_PATH
- GHOST_API_KEY
- GHOST_WORKER_COUNT
- GHOST_MAX_BATCH_SIZE

Files worth reading:
- README.md
- docs/llm-api-reference.md
- main.py
- saas_service.py
- saas_store.py

If you are an agent integrating this API:
- prefer /v1/transcripts and /v1/batches over /api/transcript
- always send X-API-Key
- treat 202 as accepted work, not completed work
- poll until terminal status
